passed_checks.check_name: Ensure no hard coded AWS access key and secret key exists in provider
Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port -1
Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 3389
EC2 instance should not have public IP.
Ensure no hard-coded secrets exist in EC2 user data
Ensure VPC subnets do not assign public IP by default
Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
code_block:
resource "aws_db_instance" "main" {
  identifier        = "quantumtrade-db"
  engine            = "postgres"
  engine_version    = "14"
  instance_class    = "db.t3.medium"
  allocated_storage = 100

  db_name  = "quantumtrade"
  username = "admin"
  password = var**********

  vpc_security_group_ids = [aws_security_group.app_sg.id]
  db_subnet_group_name   = aws_db_subnet_group.main.name

  storage_encrypted = false  # Should be true

  # Missing: deletion protection
  # Missing: backup retention
  # Missing: multi-AZ

  tags = {
    Name = "QuantumTrade Database"
  }
}

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLS enabled
code_block:
resource "aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block" "data_bucket_pab" {
  bucket = aws_s3_bucket.data_bucket.id

  block_public_acls       = false  # Should be true
  block_public_policy     = false  # Should be true
  ignore_public_acls      = false  # Should be true
  restrict_public_buckets = false  # Should be true
}
